initial_candidates.sql:
WITH driver_season_points AS (
    SELECT 
        ds.race_id,
        ds.driver_id,
        SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
    FROM driver_standings ds
    JOIN races r ON ds.race_id = r.race_id
    WHERE r.year >= 2001
    GROUP BY ds.race_id, ds.driver_id
    HAVING SUM(ds.points) > 0
),
min_points_per_season AS (
    SELECT 
        race_id,
        MIN(total_points) AS min_points
    FROM driver_season_points
    GROUP BY race_id
),
constructor_season_points AS (
    SELECT 
        cr.race_id,
        cr.constructor_id,
        SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
    FROM constructor_results cr
    JOIN races r ON cr.race_id = r.race_id
    WHERE r.year >= 2001
    GROUP BY cr.race_id, cr.constructor_id
),
seasons_with_fewest_points AS (
    SELECT 
        csp.race_id,
        csp.constructor_id,
        csp.total_points,
        CASE 
            WHEN csp.total_points = mps.min_points THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS is_fewest
    FROM constructor_season_points csp
    JOIN min_points_per_season mps ON csp.race_id = mps.race_id
    WHERE csp.total_points > 0
)
SELECT 
    con.name AS constructor_name,
    COUNT(sfp.is_fewest) AS seasons_with_fewest_points
FROM seasons_with_fewest_points sfp
JOIN constructors con ON sfp.constructor_id = con.constructor_id
WHERE sfp.is_fewest = 1
GROUP BY con.name
ORDER BY seasons_with_fewest_points DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH min_points_per_season AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        MIN(driver_standings.points) AS min_points
    FROM races
    JOIN driver_standings ON races.race_id = driver_standings.race_id
    WHERE races.year >= 2001
      AND driver_standings.points > 0
    GROUP BY races.year
),
constructor_points_per_season AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        constructors.name AS constructor_name,
        SUM(constructor_results.points) AS total_points
    FROM races
    JOIN constructor_results ON races.race_id = constructor_results.race_id
    JOIN constructors ON constructor_results.constructor_id = constructors.constructor_id
    WHERE races.year >= 2001
    GROUP BY races.year, constructors.name
),
seasons_with_fewest_points AS (
    SELECT 
        cpps.constructor_name,
        cpps.year
    FROM constructor_points_per_season cpps
    JOIN min_points_per_season mpps ON cpps.year = mpps.year
    WHERE cpps.total_points = mpps.min_points
)
SELECT 
    constructor_name,
    COUNT(*) AS seasons_with_fewest_points
FROM seasons_with_fewest_points
GROUP BY constructor_name
ORDER BY seasons_with_fewest_points DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH min_points_per_season AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        MIN(ds.points) AS min_points
    FROM races r
    JOIN driver_standings ds ON r.race_id = ds.race_id
    WHERE r.year >= 2001 AND ds.points > 0
    GROUP BY r.year
),
constructors_with_min_points AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        c.name AS constructor_name,
        r.year
    FROM races r
    JOIN constructor_results cr ON r.race_id = cr.race_id
    JOIN constructors c ON cr.constructor_id = c.constructor_id
    JOIN driver_standings ds ON r.race_id = ds.race_id
    JOIN min_points_per_season mps ON r.year = mps.year AND ds.points = mps.min_points
    WHERE r.year >= 2001 AND ds.points > 0
)
SELECT 
    constructor_name,
    COUNT(*) AS seasons_with_fewest_points
FROM constructors_with_min_points
GROUP BY constructor_name
ORDER BY seasons_with_fewest_points DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH point_scoring_drivers_per_season AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        ds.driver_id,
        SUM(ds.points) AS total_points
    FROM races r
    JOIN driver_standings ds ON r.race_id = ds.race_id
    WHERE r.year >= 2001
    GROUP BY r.year, ds.driver_id
    HAVING SUM(ds.points) > 0
),
min_points_per_season AS (
    SELECT 
        year,
        MIN(total_points) AS min_points
    FROM point_scoring_drivers_per_season
    GROUP BY year
),
drivers_with_min_points AS (
    SELECT 
        ps.year,
        ps.driver_id
    FROM point_scoring_drivers_per_season ps
    JOIN min_points_per_season mp ON ps.year = mp.year AND ps.total_points = mp.min_points
),
constructor_points_per_season AS (
    SELECT 
        r.year,
        cr.constructor_id,
        SUM(cr.points) AS total_points
    FROM races r
    JOIN constructor_results cr ON r.race_id = cr.race_id
    WHERE r.year >= 2001
    GROUP BY r.year, cr.constructor_id
    HAVING SUM(cr.points) > 0
),
constructors_with_min_points AS (
    SELECT 
        crps.year,
        crps.constructor_id
    FROM constructor_points_per_season crps
    JOIN min_points_per_season mp ON crps.year = mp.year AND crps.total_points = mp.min_points
)
SELECT 
    c.name,
    COUNT(*) AS seasons_with_fewest_points
FROM constructors_with_min_points cm
JOIN constructors c ON cm.constructor_id = c.constructor_id
GROUP BY c.name
ORDER BY seasons_with_fewest_points DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH min_points_per_season AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        MIN(driver_standings.points) AS min_points
    FROM races
    INNER JOIN driver_standings ON races.race_id = driver_standings.race_id
    WHERE races.year >= 2001
      AND driver_standings.points > 0
    GROUP BY races.year
),
seasons_with_min_points AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        races.year,
        driver_standings.driver_id
    FROM races
    INNER JOIN driver_standings ON races.race_id = driver_standings.race_id
    INNER JOIN min_points_per_season ON races.year = min_points_per_season.year
                                         AND driver_standings.points = min_points_per_season.min_points
    WHERE races.year >= 2001
      AND driver_standings.points > 0
),
constructor_min_seasons AS (
    SELECT 
        constructors.name,
        COUNT(*) AS seasons_with_fewest_points
    FROM seasons_with_min_points
    INNER JOIN results ON seasons_with_min_points.year = races.year 
                       AND seasons_with_min_points.driver_id = results.driver_id
    INNER JOIN races ON results.race_id = races.race_id
    INNER JOIN constructors ON results.constructor_id = constructors.constructor_id
    GROUP BY constructors.name
)
SELECT 
    name,
    seasons_with_fewest_points
FROM constructor_min_seasons
ORDER BY seasons_with_fewest_points DESC
LIMIT 5;

aggregation.selected_sql:
WITH min_points_per_season AS (
    SELECT 
        races.year,
        MIN(driver_standings.points) AS min_points
    FROM races
    INNER JOIN driver_standings ON races.race_id = driver_standings.race_id
    WHERE races.year >= 2001
      AND driver_standings.points > 0
    GROUP BY races.year
),
seasons_with_min_points AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        races.year,
        driver_standings.driver_id
    FROM races
    INNER JOIN driver_standings ON races.race_id = driver_standings.race_id
    INNER JOIN min_points_per_season ON races.year = min_points_per_season.year
                                         AND driver_standings.points = min_points_per_season.min_points
    WHERE races.year >= 2001
      AND driver_standings.points > 0
),
constructor_min_seasons AS (
    SELECT 
        constructors.name,
        COUNT(*) AS seasons_with_fewest_points
    FROM seasons_with_min_points
    INNER JOIN results ON seasons_with_min_points.year = races.year 
                       AND seasons_with_min_points.driver_id = results.driver_id
    INNER JOIN races ON results.race_id = races.race_id
    INNER JOIN constructors ON results.constructor_id = constructors.constructor_id
    GROUP BY constructors.name
)
SELECT 
    name,
    seasons_with_fewest_points
FROM constructor_min_seasons
ORDER BY seasons_with_fewest_points DESC
LIMIT 5;
